title: Always Up To Date Config
description: Configuration for the always-up-to-date CLI. Lives at .always-up-to-date.json in the project root.

$schema.description: URL of this JSON schema. Enables IDE autocomplete and validation.

allowMinorUpdates.description: Allow minor version bumps (e.g., 1.2.x → 1.3.0). Patch updates are always allowed.

allowMajorUpdates.description: Allow major version bumps (e.g., 1.x → 2.0.0). Implies allowMinorUpdates.

updateAllowlist.description: Package names that are always eligible to update, regardless of allowMinor/allowMajor settings.

updateDenylist.description: Package names that are never updated.

cooldown.description: Hold off on suggesting versions newer than this. Accepts a number (days), a duration string ('1 week', '24h', '7 days'), or a per-update-type object whose values are themselves numbers or duration strings.

oneOf.description: Cooldown window in days (applied to every update type).
Duration string ('1 week', '24h', '7 days'). Bare numbers are interpreted as days.
Per-update-type cooldown windows. Missing keys default to 0.
